headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall; Stock Market Slashes Losses, Oil Pares Gains As Trump Says This
summary: The major indexes came off lows and crude oil prices pared gains as President Trump said the Navy would escort tankers through the Strait of Hormuz if necessary.

headline: CrowdStrike ARR Tops US$5b As Identity And AI Security Expand
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (NasdaqGS:CRWD) reported a record fiscal year, reaching more than $5b in annual recurring revenue. The company launched FalconID, a next generation, passwordless authentication product with AI resistant multifactor authentication. CrowdStrike announced a partnership with VAST Data and NVIDIA focused on securing data across the full AI workflow. CrowdStrike enters this phase with its shares at $391.42 and a long run track record that includes a 3 year return of 213.3%...

headline: CrowdStrike Earnings Beat Estimates. The Stock Is Up.
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings  reported better-than-expected earnings after the stock market closed Tuesday.  CrowdStrike posted fourth-quarter adjusted earnings of $1.12 a share, which came in above analyst estimates of $1.10 a share, according to FactSet.  Annual recurring revenue, or the annualized value of CrowdStrike’s customer subscription contracts, was $5.25 billion, a 24% increase from the prior year.

content.title: CrowdStrike Earnings Beat Estimates. The Stock Is Up.
content.summary: CrowdStrike Holdings  reported better-than-expected earnings after the stock market closed Tuesday.  CrowdStrike posted fourth-quarter adjusted earnings of $1.12 a share, which came in above analyst estimates of $1.10 a share, according to FactSet.  Annual recurring revenue, or the annualized value of CrowdStrike’s customer subscription contracts, was $5.25 billion, a 24% increase from the prior year.

headline: Day Zero 2026 Threat Research Summit: Call for Technical Research Now Open
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, March 04, 2026--CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) is accepting submissions for its inaugural Day Zero Threat Research Summit, an invitation-only event bringing together the brightest minds across the global threat intelligence community to uncover the latest in adversary tradecraft and advance modern cyber defense. The summit will take place August 30 – September 1, 2026 at the Mandalay Bay Hotel and Resort in Las Vegas as part of Fal.Con 2026, the premier cybersecurity event of the year
